curation.synopsis: Fleet Secundus carves a course straight toward the Eye of Terror, and the Imperial Navy battle cruiser Judgement of the Void leads it. A handful of Adeptus Astartes, a squad of Adepta Sororitas including the hospitaller Sister Isobel, and a tightly drawn crew of mortals must endure a journey that becomes its own kind of warfare: nightmares bleeding through hull-plating, treachery splitting the bridge, the deep warp pressing on every soul aboard. The deeper they sail, the more clearly the ship - and its passengers - become the battlefield. By the time the enemy closes in for real, the Judgement of the Void's crew are already half-broken, and the wider schemes of the Indomitus Crusade have begun to unravel.

flags.reason: Chaos antagonist sub-faction not confidently identifiable from public sources for this Eye-of-Terror voyage
